q1.question: How do I book a ride with OUTAI App?
q1.answer: Simply download our app, create an account, enter your pickup and destination, choose your ride type, and confirm. A driver will be assigned within minutes.

q2.question: How can I track my OUTAI ride?
q2.answer: Once your ride is confirmed, you can track your driver in real-time through the app. You'll see the driver's location, estimated arrival time, and can contact them directly if needed.

q3.question: How do you ensure passenger safety?
q3.answer: All our drivers undergo thorough background checks and training. Our vehicles are regularly inspected, and we have 24/7 support, real-time GPS tracking, and emergency assistance features in the app.

q4.question: What type of vehicles are available on OUTAI App?
q4.answer: We offer a range of premium vehicles including sedans, SUVs, and luxury cars. All vehicles are well-maintained, clean, and equipped with modern amenities for your comfort.

q5.question: How do I pay for my ride?
q5.answer: You can pay through multiple methods including credit/debit cards, mobile wallets, or cash. All payments are secure and you'll receive a detailed receipt after each ride.

q6.question: What is meant by 'around the clock'?
q6.answer: Around the clock means our services are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Whether you need a ride at 3 AM or 3 PM, OUTAI is always ready to serve you.

q7.question: Is OUTAI App available for corporate accounts?
q7.answer: Yes! We offer corporate accounts with special rates, centralized billing, detailed reporting, and dedicated account management for businesses of all sizes.
